canonical_name: FYVE, RhoGEF and PH Domain Containing 6
step_rationale: Guanine-nucleotide exchange factor; elevated in incident AMI; possible role in platelet regulation.
mechanism: FGD6, elevated during acute MI, may regulate small-GTPase signaling in platelet or endothelial dysfunction.

references.title: A Mass Spectrometry-Based Proteome Study of Twin Pairs Discordant for Incident Acute Myocardial Infarction within Three Years after Blood Sampling Suggests Novel Biomarkers.
